original_image_tags: A large, dark, circular stamp reads "STOP".
Large handwritten file number at bottom right:
Handwritten initials near bottom right stamp:

elements.description: Multiple stamps and handwritten annotations: 'RS' stamp, 'TOP SECRET' stamp (partially obscured), '162-83894-86 FBI' handwritten numbers, '51 SEP 29 1947 COPIES DESTROYED 270 NOV 18 1964' stamped text, 'EX-64 RECORDED INDEXED 19' stamped text, and various handwritten initials and checkmarks.

judge.reason: Description A and B quote completely different verbatim text for stamps (A: 'STOP'; B: 'RS', 'TOP SECRET', 'EX-64 RECORDED INDEXED 19', etc.) and describe different sets of visual elements, indicating they are hallucinating conflicting details about the same visual content.
